nasb.text: He brought into the house of the Lord the dedicated things of his father and his own dedicated things: silver and gold and utensils.

esv.text: And he brought into the house of the Lord the sacred gifts of his father and his own sacred gifts, silver, and gold, and vessels.

cnv.text: 亞撒把他父親所分別為聖和他自己所分別為聖的金銀和器皿，都帶到耶和華的殿裡。

ccb.text: 他又把他父亲和他自己所献上的金银和器皿都带到耶和华的殿里。
